# NSRecoveryAttempterErrorKey

The corresponding value is an object that conforms to the NSErrorRecoveryAttempting informal protocol. The recovery attempter must be an object that can correctly interpret an index into the array returned by [doc://com.apple.foundation/documentation/Foundation/NSError/recoveryAttempter].
title: NSRecoveryAttempterErrorKey
